response.global_summary: A video of Momosuzu Nene performing live during her birthday concert in 2026. The video features a song titled 'かくれんぼ' (Kakurenbo) composed by Wataru Ujihara, as indicated by on-screen credits.

scenes.description: The performer, Momosuzu Nene, is dancing and singing on a colorful stage. On-screen text indicates the song title is 'かくれんぼ' (Kakurenbo) and composer is Wataru Ujihara.
